text:
# Docs for the Azure Web Apps Deploy action: https://github.com/Azure/webapps-deploy
# More GitHub Actions for Azure: https://github.com/Azure/actions
# More info on Python, GitHub Actions, and Azure App Service: https://aka.ms/python-webapps-actions

name: Build and deploy Python app to Azure Web App - Alphalumae

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - dev
  workflow_dispatch:

env:
  FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24: true

jobs:
  build_and_deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write   # Required for azure/login OIDC auth

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v5

      - name: Set up Python version
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.12'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pip install -r requirements.txt

      # Optional: Add test step here if needed

      - name: Zip package for deployment
        run: |
          rm -f release.zip
          zip -r release.zip . \
            -x "venv/*" ".venv/*" ".venv-linux/*" ".python311-home/*" ".python312-home/*" \
               ".git/*" ".github/*" ".claude/*" ".agents/*" "__pycache__/*" "*.pyc" ".pytest_cache/*" \
               "tests/*" "tests_js/*" "docs/*" "local testing/*" "journal/*" "node_modules/*" \
               "pytest*.log" "tmp_*.log"
          ls -lh release.zip

      - name: Login to Azure
        uses: azure/login@v2
        with:
          client-id: ${{ secrets.AZUREAPPSERVICE_CLIENTID_7298E7F3DC6A48CDBAA59F93777672CA }}
          tenant-id: ${{ secrets.AZUREAPPSERVICE_TENANTID_84AFE9F5EB9F44308E29B26C829DA811 }}
          subscription-id: ${{ secrets.AZUREAPPSERVICE_SUBSCRIPTIONID_914295238B3D4E52897FE663F61F89B9 }}

      - name: Deploy to Azure Web App
        uses: azure/webapps-deploy@v3
        id: deploy-to-webapp
        with:
          app-name: 'Alphalumae'
          slot-name: 'Production'
          package: release.zip
